title: Bootstrap Next.js 14 app with TypeScript strict, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui
description: Initialise the Next.js 14 App Router project with strict TypeScript, configure Tailwind CSS, install and configure shadcn/ui with a neutral theme. Set up path aliases and the validated env.ts config module.

acceptance_criteria.text: TypeScript strict mode enabled in tsconfig.json
Tailwind CSS configured with custom design tokens for legal/professional aesthetic
shadcn/ui initialised with at least Button, Card, Dialog, Input, Badge components installed
env.ts validates all required env vars at startup using Zod
Path alias `@/` resolves to `/src` or project root

steps: Run `npx create-next-app@latest` with TypeScript, App Router, Tailwind options
Run `npx shadcn-ui@latest init` with slate theme
Install shadcn components: button, card, dialog, input, badge, table, tabs, sidebar
Create `lib/env.ts` with Zod schema validating all env vars
risks: shadcn/ui CLI version compatibility with Next.js 14 App Router — check docs before running init
